modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: PDF printing fails to include image from Milestone XProtect.

full_description_text: User tries to print to PDF. Image area is blank. No picture shows up. This happens in Milestone XProtect on Windows 10.
short_description: PDF printing fails to include image from Milestone XProtect.
description: User tries to print to PDF. Image area is blank. No picture shows up. This happens in Milestone XProtect on Windows 10.
